strengths: Demonstrated smooth bilateral instrument coordination during transfer phases
Maintained consistent camera positioning throughout most of the attempt
Showed good spatial awareness when navigating between pegboard positions
weaknesses: Task completion remains uncertain with conflicting evidence on final object placement
May have lost track of transferred objects during the final phases
Exceeded the time limit significantly, indicating inefficient movement patterns

drills.name: Mid-air transfer ladder
drills.description: Practice 12 full transfers without touching the pegboard for support, focusing on secure handoffs between instruments
drills.targets_weakness: Task completion remains uncertain with conflicting evidence on final object placement

drills.name: Lost-object recovery awareness
drills.description: Perform slow-motion transfer sets with deliberate pauses to verify object security before releasing grip
drills.targets_weakness: May have lost track of transferred objects during the final phases

drills.name: Economy-of-motion ladder
drills.description: Complete the transfer sequence slowly with minimal wasted regrasping and direct path planning
drills.targets_weakness: Exceeded the time limit significantly, indicating inefficient movement patterns

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your good coordination skills into reliable task completion with faster, more direct movement paths. Verify each transfer completion before proceeding to the next object.
